zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Moulton Sr.於1661年11月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓時，他的父親William Moulton I45歲，母親Margaret Page33歲。他於1689年5月29日與Lucy Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1732年10月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年70歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Moulton Sr.于1661年11月8日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾福爾可咸頓时，他的父亲William Moulton I45岁，母亲Margaret Page33岁。他于1689年5月29日与Lucy Smith在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1732年10月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓享年70岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓潘恩 葛洛夫 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Moulton Sr. was born on 8 November 1661, in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, William Moulton I, was 45 and his mother, Margaret Page, was 33. He married Lucy Smith on 29 May 1689, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 11 October 1732, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Moulton Sr. est né le 8 novembre 1661, à Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Moulton I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margaret Page, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lucy Smith le 29 mai 1689, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1732, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

November 1661 in Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Moulton I 45 und seine Mutter Margaret Page 33. Er hat am 29. Mai 1689 in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Lucy Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 11. it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Moulton Sr. è nato il il 8 novembre 1661 nel Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Moulton I, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Page, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lucy Smith il 29 maggio 1689, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 11 ottobre 1732, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton Sr.が1661年11月8日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーフォルクハンプトンで生まれた時，父William Moulton Iは45歳，母Margaret Pageは33歳であった。1689年5月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンでLucy Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1732年10月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンで70歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンピン グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Moulton Sr.(이)가 1661년 11월 8일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르폴크 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Moulton I(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Page(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1689년 5월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 Lucy Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1732년 10월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴 핀 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Moulton Sr. nasceu em 8 de novembro de 1661, em Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Moulton I, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Page, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy Smith em 29 de maio de 1689, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1732, em Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Moulton Sr. родился 8 ноября 1661 г. в местности хамптон, норфолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Moulton I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Page, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Smith 29 мая 1689 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 11 октября 1732 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности паин гров кеметири, хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Moulton Sr. nació el 8 de noviembre de 1661, en Hampton, Norfolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, William Moulton I, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margaret Page, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lucy Smith el 29 de mayo de 1689, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1732, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Pine Grove Cemetery, Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
